sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20331" key="booqu/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βοο-θύτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n20331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slaver of oxen</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
